question_or_condition: Is the cross-section profile open, closed (hollow), or solid?
explanation: An open profile was selected, so the open-form families apply.

question_or_condition: Is the cross-section profile open, closed (hollow), or solid?
explanation: A closed single-cell hollow resolves to HSS in this demo subset (the full standard resolves further to RHS / SHS / CHS).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft Part 3.2 (HSS superclass; leaves RHS/SHS/CHS)

question_or_condition: Is the cross-section profile open, closed (hollow), or solid?
explanation: A solid rectangular profile is plate/flat stock: PLT.

question_or_condition: Which open form is it?
explanation: A C-form open profile was selected; lip condition decides the terminal code.

question_or_condition: Which open form is it?
explanation: A Z-form profile resolves to ZED in this demo subset (SNAP-1.0.0 splits the Z family into ZLP / ZUN under the ZEE rollup).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft Part 3.2 (ZEE superclass; leaves ZLP/ZUN)

question_or_condition: Which open form is it?
explanation: A two-leg L profile is an angle: ANG.

question_or_condition: Are there stiffening lips on the flange ends?
explanation: No lip elements: open C unlipped, OCU.

question_or_condition: Are there stiffening lips on the flange ends?
explanation: One stiffening lip fold per flange: open C lipped, OCL.

question_or_condition: Are there stiffening lips on the flange ends?
explanation: Lip condition could not be determined; the engine refuses to guess (determinism rule P7).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft Part 3.1 (Ruling R3); Part 13.7 (W-201); principle P7

question_or_condition: What functional role does this part play?
explanation: The part carries vertical load as an upright: role COL.

question_or_condition: What functional role does this part play?
explanation: The part spans horizontally carrying load: role BEM.

question_or_condition: What functional role does this part play?
explanation: The part projects from a column to carry load: role ARM.

question_or_condition: What functional role does this part play?
explanation: The part stiffens/supports a deck or panel: role CHL (SNAP-1.0.0 names this role DKS).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft Part 3.3 (SNAP-1.0.0 role: DKS)

question_or_condition: Is it a prismatic member (constant cross-section along its length)?
explanation: Prismatic member: its cross-section is classified next and referenced by the component.
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft §4.9 (prismatic test); rule G-3

question_or_condition: Is it a prismatic member (constant cross-section along its length)?
explanation: Non-prismatic parts carry no section reference; role classification is complete.
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft §4.9 (component without section reference)

question_or_condition: What kind of assemblage is it?
explanation: Mesh joined to distinct-role support members: assembly type WDK.

question_or_condition: What kind of assemblage is it?
explanation: Columns joined by bracing with distinct roles: assembly type FRM.

question_or_condition: Front edge condition of the deck?
explanation: Front edge FLUSH recorded as configuration (CFG:EDG) — variation lives in fields, not codes (rule P5).

question_or_condition: Front edge condition of the deck?
explanation: Front edge WATERFALL recorded as configuration (CFG:EDG) — variation lives in fields, not codes (rule P5).

question_or_condition: How many support channels?
explanation: Support count 2 recorded as configuration (CFG:SUP).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft P5; rule D-6; Part 3.6 (CFG:SUP)

question_or_condition: How many support channels?
explanation: Support count 3 recorded as configuration (CFG:SUP).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft P5; rule D-6; Part 3.6 (CFG:SUP)

question_or_condition: How many support channels?
explanation: Support count 4 recorded as configuration (CFG:SUP).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft P5; rule D-6; Part 3.6 (CFG:SUP)

question_or_condition: How is the bracing joined to the columns?
explanation: Bolted bracing recorded as configuration (CFG:JNT).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft P5; rule D-6; Part 3.6 (CFG:JNT)

question_or_condition: How is the bracing joined to the columns?
explanation: Welded bracing recorded as configuration (CFG:JNT).
standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft P5; rule D-6; Part 3.6 (CFG:JNT)
